name: People Data Labs API
what_it_does: Enriches person and company records with professional data including employment history, education, skills, emails, and firmographics by matching against a database of 1.5 billion+ person profiles and 100 million+ company records.
use_cases: Enrich a lead record with current employer, job title, and work email by matching on name and personal email for CRM automation agents
Look up a company's headcount, industry, funding stage, and tech stack by domain name for sales intelligence workflows
Build a prospect list by querying for people matching specific job titles, industries, and locations using the Search API
Verify and augment a contact database with standardized employment history to improve segmentation for marketing automation
Identify decision-makers at target accounts by searching for C-suite and VP-level profiles at specific companies by domain
not_for: Consumer identity verification or KYC compliance — PDL data is B2B professional data, not regulated identity data
Real-time social media monitoring or content analysis
Highly accurate personal phone number lookups — mobile numbers are sparse and lower confidence
best_when: You need comprehensive B2B professional enrichment with high match rates across a broad input signal set (name, email, LinkedIn URL, phone, etc.).
avoid_when: Your use case involves consumer data enrichment in regulated contexts (FCRA/CCPA compliance requirements), or you need real-time data freshness guarantees.

auth.notes: API key passed via the `X-Api-Key` HTTP header. Single key grants access to all endpoints the account is provisioned for.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 100 free API calls on signup, no credit card required
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go credits starting ~$0.04/successful match; subscription plans available for volume; enterprise contracts for bulk data licensing
pricing.notes: Credits are consumed only on successful matches with data returned. Failed matches (no data found) typically do not consume credits.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by plan; typical production keys allow 1,000+ requests/minute. Bulk endpoints available for large-scale enrichment.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-structured JSON error responses with status codes and descriptive messages. HTTP 404 for no match vs 400 for bad request is clearly distinguished.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Enrichment and search endpoints are read-only; safe to retry. Credit consumption on retry for successful matches should be considered.
known_agent_gotchas: A 404 response means no matching profile was found — this is a business logic outcome, not an error; agents must handle this as a valid non-match case
Match confidence varies widely; the `likelihood` score should be used to filter low-confidence matches before using the data
The Search API requires careful field selection — requesting all fields on large result sets can be expensive in credits and slow
Employment data may be out of date by 6-18 months for job changes; do not treat current employer as real-time fact
Bulk enrichment via the Bulk endpoint has different rate limits and response timing than single-record lookups

security_score_components.security_notes: API key via header (good practice). Contains PII-adjacent professional data — GDPR and CCPA compliance documentation available. No granular scopes for limiting data access per key.
